name: @ankit-prop/ctrader-vendor
description: In-house cTrader Open API client over Bun-native WSS — Phase 2 dependency (ANKA-12). Offline scaffold: §10.3 7-step smoke harness, AES-GCM refresh-token store (BLUEPRINT §10.2), protobufjs codec backed by Spotware's vendored .proto files at a pinned commit. ADR-012 (vendor vs in-house) is sealed once §10.3 step 7 runs live against the FTMO Free Trial socket.
